retry_reason: The conditional get always succeeds when executed (aa_get_newest_label always returns a valid reference); there is no failure path to retry.
contract_summary: Conditionally obtains a reference to the newest aa_label from a cred. If the current label is stale, acquires a new reference via aa_get_newest_label and sets *needput=true (caller must release). Otherwise, returns the label without a new reference and sets *needput=false (caller must not release). The caller MUST check *needput to determine ownership: only when true does the caller own a reference and must later call aa_put_label. This function does not handle errors; it always succeeds.
